title: 200 x Strung Kraft Paper Bags (10 x 10 inch) – Brown Paper Bags for Food, Lunch, Gifts, Groceries, Sandwiches & Takeaway | Greaseproof & Eco-Friendly Fruit Bag | Recyclable Large Brown Bag
features: ✔Perfectly Sized for Small Items: These 10x10 inches strung kraft paper bags are ideal for storing snacks, sweets, groceries, sandwich, or small food items without any mess. These bags can be used for lots of things, school lunches, picnics, takeaways, gift bags, party bags, sweet bags, food storage.
✔ Eco-Friendly and Recyclable: Made from biodegradable kraft paper, these large brown paper bags are a sustainable choice for packaging needs.
✔ Durable and Greaseproof: Designed to hold oily or moist items without tearing, perfect as carrier bags or delivery bag.
✔ Multipurpose Use: Great for lunches, small gift wrapping, party favors, or as takeaway bags for small servings like popcorn, biscuits, crisps.
✔ 100% Satisfaction: These bags go through multiple quality control measures to ensure you are completely happy with the item.
